zodiacSigns.recommendation: Download from SVG Repo or Hexmos, then customize stroke color to #C9A84C and stroke-width to 2px for brand consistency

sources: Lucide icons (lucide.dev) — for fallback UI icons (compass, home, gem, flame, etc.)
IconScout — 57,090 astrology icons in multiple styles
Custom SVG — recommended for unique spiritual icons not in standard libraries
serviceIcons.recommendation: Use Lucide as base icon library for UI consistency, supplement with custom SVGs for spiritual-specific icons (diya, OM, trident, chakra). Maintain consistent 2px stroke, 64x64 viewBox.
